title: Bingus SMP Season 7
description: The Bingus SMP Season 7 This Season is more of a random bunch of stuff thrown around you can play the modpack on the server already on the modpack in the server lists
body:
**PACK HAS BEEN MOVED TO CURSE FORGE FOR ALL FUTURE UPDATES**
this is do to as modpack creator and player it is currently more easier to work with Curseforge to make packs than modrinth do to modrinth making it hard to change a pack verision and checking updates of a pack and limited mods we do hope modrinth will fix these problems and we whish them the best of luck but untill then the Bingus SMP will stay on curse forge

The Bingus SMP Modpack is the official pack for the Bingus SMP server, now entering its 7th season. This pack is built for players who enjoy a balanced mix of technology, magic, and exploration, offering a true kitchen sink experience.

Featuring popular mods such as Create, Ars Nouveau, Mekanism, and many more, the pack provides endless opportunities for automation, crafting, and creativity. Whether you want to design complex factories, master magical systems, or simply explore with friends, there’s something here for everyone.

The Bingus SMP server is already included in the pack for easy access. Join a friendly, active community of players who enjoy collaborating, building, and having fun together.

Perfect for both casual and dedicated modded Minecraft players, this pack aims to deliver a smooth and enjoyable multiplayer experience while keeping things simple to join and play.
